construction.label: Construction & Trades
employment_hooks: OSHA 29 CFR Part 1926 construction standards + General Duty Clause
FLSA prevailing-wage overlays on federal/public works (Davis-Bacon — separate lane)
State workers' compensation mandatory in all five seed states
Child-labor hazardous occupation orders for under-18 workers on job sites

healthcare.label: Healthcare Practice
employment_hooks: OSHA bloodborne pathogens (29 CFR 1910.1030) for clinical staff
FEHA / NYHRL / state anti-discrimination beyond federal Title VII
Paid sick leave mandates (CA, NY) for clinical and admin staff
HIPAA workforce training separate from employment law — cross-reference R6

childcare.label: Childcare / Early Education
employment_hooks: FLSA child-labor restrictions and hazardous occupation orders
State background-check and ratio staffing rules — REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION per license type
Paid sick leave (CA, NY) and workers' comp mandatory coverage
EEOC hiring screening guidance for criminal history in caregiver roles

all_employer_baseline: OSHA workplace safety and injury reporting
EEOC anti-discrimination in hiring and employment
State UI registration and mandatory workplace posters
